identity.name: Mira OS
identity.tagline: The World's First Pet Operating System
identity.description: A proactive, concierge-driven experience that transforms a standard e-commerce site into a personalized intelligent OS for pet parenting.

ios.gestures: Swipe to dismiss modals, Edge swipe for back
ios.haptics: Soft impact for selection, Success for completion
ios.safe_areas: Respect top notch and bottom home indicator

android.elevation: Tonal elevation instead of heavy shadows

desktop.keyboard_shortcuts: Esc to close modal, Cmd+K for command palette

rules.headings: No 'Inter' for headings. Use Manrope or Syne.
rules.readability: High contrast (WCAG AA). 1.6 line-height for body.
rules.hierarchy: Use size and weight, not just color.

mira_fab.name: The Mira Orb
mira_fab.description: The primary interaction point. Floats above content.
mira_fab.appearance: 3.5rem circle, Mira Magic gradient, white border
mira_fab.animation: Subtle pulse when idle. Expands to OS Modal on click.
mira_fab.interaction: Tap to open OS Modal. Drag to move (optional future).

os_modal.name: Mira OS Layer
os_modal.behavior_mobile: Full-screen modal, slides up from bottom. 100% width/height.
os_modal.behavior_desktop: Side drawer, slides in from right. 400px width.

concierge_icon.name: Helping Hands
concierge_icon.behavior: Always visible in Navbar/Header. Lights up/Glows when product selected.
concierge_icon.state_active: Opacity 1, Color: Mira Purple, Glow effect
concierge_icon.trigger: User Intent -> Ticket Created -> Icon Glows

curated_badge.style: Small purple dot or 'Picks' label inside product card
curated_badge.meaning: Mira has curated this specifically for the selected pet

pet_switcher.style: Horizontal scroll of pet avatars. Active pet has ring.

concierge_card.style: Bento-style, clean white surface, soft shadow.

bento_grid.rules: Mix square and tall rectangular cards. No perfect symmetry.

animation_standards.reduced_motion: Respect user preference. Fade instead of slide.

assets.image_style: High-quality, natural lighting, genuine pet emotion. No stock-photo look.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is readable on glass backgrounds.
accessibility.touch: All interactive elements must be at least 44px.
accessibility.labels: Aria-labels for all icon-only buttons (FAB, Concierge).
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings for keyboard navigation.

implementation_steps.step_1: Implement global MiraFab component ensuring z-index > 50.
implementation_steps.step_2: Create/Update MiraTray to handle Full-screen (Mobile) vs Drawer (Desktop).
implementation_steps.step_3: Integrate Concierge 'Light Up' logic using global state (Zustand/Context).
implementation_steps.step_5: Refine Bento Grid layouts for Dashboard/Home.
